description:
The ButtonOpenHome component, when pressed with an IButton, takes the User to their favorite home world (usually the Resonite Cloud Home by default). There is an optional string input for a group home.

}}

fields.LastOpened: Shows when the world was last opened (not shown in the component).
fields.GroupOwnerId: An optional string input for a group home.

usage: This is an easy way to set up a way to get to your favorite home faster.
